title: Beauty From Ashes

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ash in the air, I breathe it in slow
Ghost of the fire still under my clothes
I built my grief into towers of smoke
But something inside wouldn’t choke

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I heard a voice in the ruin and haze
Not loud, not sharp—just a shimmer of grace
It whispered, *“You’re more than what’s burned,”*
And somewhere inside me, something turned

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You gave me beauty from ashes
Not loud, not bright—just true
A crown made of silence and sadness,
Now wearing the weight like new
You turned the wreck into refuge
Where I saw only end
You gave me beauty from ashes
And I began again

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I held the night like a wound in my palm
Now it bleeds light, slow and calm
The scars don't beg to disappear
They speak of the flames that led me here

sections.label: Spoken
lines: Ashes fall like holy rain
Covering what I couldn’t explain
But in the black, there bloomed a name—
"Beloved," carved into the flame

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Still broken, still breathing, still bound to this skin
But there’s gold in the cracks I’ve been living in

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You gave me beauty from ashes
A whisper louder than pain
Joy that doesn’t erase it
But gives the sorrow a name
You turned my mourning to meaning
Not perfect, but real and wide—
You gave me beauty from ashes,
And I won’t ever hide

sections.label: Outro
lines: If I am smoke, then You are the wind
If I am ruin, You move within
Ashes don’t bury, they bloom
And I am proof

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You gave me beauty from ashes
A whisper louder than pain
Joy that doesn’t erase it
But gives the sorrow a name
You turned my mourning to meaning
Not perfect, but real and wide—
You gave me beauty from ashes,
And I won’t ever hide
Ashes don’t bury, they bloom
And I am proof

epigraph: to give unto them beauty for ashes
